description: An editor needs to write a major feature article summarizing the most important news events of the past year.

nodes.task_description: Search the archive for the most significant stories published by the organization over the last 12 months.

expected_outcome.expected: A list of the year's top stories is compiled.

nodes.task_description: Group the stories by theme (e.g., Politics, Business, Culture) and outline a structure for the article.

expected_outcome.expected: A logical structure for the year-in-review piece is created.

nodes.task_description: Draft the article, weaving the individual stories into a larger narrative about the year.

expected_outcome.expected: A comprehensive and engaging summary of the year's events is written.
